memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blue（蓝）+ moon（月）→ 蓝月，极罕见之事，once in a blue moon
blue + -en → 使变蓝
blue + -ness → 蓝的状态，蓝色感
blue（蓝）+ print（印）→ 蓝图，建筑/规划蓝图，引申为详细计划
blueprint + s → 多份蓝图/计划

coreMeaning.en: blues music; a feeling of sadness

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blue（忧郁）→ the blues，起源于非裔美国人表达悲伤的音乐形式

coreMeaning.cn: 蓝屏（计算机系统崩溃画面）
coreMeaning.en: blue screen (of death); computer crash screen

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blue（蓝）+ screen（屏幕）→ 蓝屏，电脑崩溃时出现的蓝色错误画面
blues（忧郁）+ -en → 使感到忧郁
blue + -est → 最蓝的，最忧郁的

coreMeaning.en: bluestocking; an intellectual or literary woman

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blue（蓝）+ stocking（长袜）→ 18世纪英国文学沙龙中穿蓝袜的博学女性，指才女
bluestocking + s → 多位才女

coreMeaning.cn: 带有蓝调风格的；忧郁的
coreMeaning.en: resembling or characteristic of blues music; melancholy

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blues（蓝调）+ -y → 具有蓝调风格的，忧郁的

coreMeaning.cn: 蓝牙技术（短距离无线通信标准）
coreMeaning.en: Bluetooth; a wireless technology standard for short-range communication

morphemes.meaning: 蓝牙（专有名词，源自丹麦国王Harald Bluetooth）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Bluetooth（蓝牙）→ 源自丹麦国王Harald Bluetooth的绰号，他统一了斯堪的纳维亚部落，该技术也旨在统一各种通信协议
blue（蓝色/忧郁）作动词 → 使感到忧郁

coreMeaning.en: bluff; a steep cliff; to deceive by a false show of confidence

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bluff → 外表粗犷的断崖，引申为虚张声势、用假象欺骗他人

coreMeaning.cn: 虚张声势（过去式）；已欺骗

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bluff + -ed → 曾经虚张声势/欺骗

coreMeaning.en: one who bluffs; a person who deceives

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bluff + -er → 擅长虚张声势的人，欺骗者

coreMeaning.en: plural of bluffer; people who bluff

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bluffer + s → 多个虚张声势的人

coreMeaning.cn: 虚张声势（进行时）；欺骗行为

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bluff + -ing → 正在虚张声势/欺骗

coreMeaning.en: bluff as a noun; an act of bluffing

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bluff 作名词 → 一次虚张声势的行为

coreMeaning.en: bluffness; the quality of being bluff (frank or hearty)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bluff（直率的）+ -ness → 直率、粗犷的性质

coreMeaning.cn: 断崖（复数）；虚张声势（三单）
coreMeaning.en: plural of bluff (cliffs); third person singular of bluff

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bluff + s → 多处断崖，或他/她虚张声势

coreMeaning.en: to bluff; to deceive by pretense

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: bluff 作动词 → 通过虚假表现来欺骗

coreMeaning.en: somewhat blue; having a slight blue tinge

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blue + -ish → 略带蓝色，浅蓝色调

coreMeaning.en: Blum (proper noun, surname or place name)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Blum → 德语姓氏，意为花朵（Blume），常见欧洲人名

coreMeaning.en: Blumenthal (proper noun, surname or place name)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: Blumenthal → 德语，意为花谷（Blumen=花，thal=谷），常见德国/犹太姓氏

coreMeaning.cn: 大错；蠢事；跌跌撞撞地走
coreMeaning.en: blunder; a stupid or careless mistake; to move clumsily

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunder → 像瞎子（blind）乱撞，犯下愚蠢错误

coreMeaning.cn: 喇叭枪（短管大口径旧式火枪）；笨拙的人
coreMeaning.en: blunderbuss; an old short-barreled gun with a wide bore; a clumsy person

morphemes.meaning: 喇叭枪（荷兰语 donderbus=雷声筒）

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunder（笨拙）+ buss（管）→ 喇叭枪，古代散弹短枪，因笨重而得名
blunderbuss + es → 多把喇叭枪

coreMeaning.cn: 犯了大错（过去式）；曾跌跌撞撞
coreMeaning.en: past tense of blunder; made a careless mistake

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunder + -ed → 曾经犯下大错

coreMeaning.en: one who blunders; a clumsy person who makes mistakes

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunder + -er → 经常犯大错的人，笨拙者

coreMeaning.en: plural of blunderer; people who make clumsy mistakes

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunderer + s → 多个笨拙的犯错者

coreMeaning.cn: 充满错误的；荒谬的（戏谑用法）
coreMeaning.en: full of blunders; humorously used to describe something wonderfully wrong

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunder（错误）+ -ful（充满）→ 充满错误，戏谑词汇，类似wonderful但意为满是失误

coreMeaning.en: present participle of blunder; clumsy or making mistakes

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunder + -ing → 正在犯大错，或描述笨拙的行为

coreMeaning.en: plural of blundering; multiple clumsy mistakes

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunderings → 多次笨拙的错误行为

coreMeaning.en: blunder as a noun; a stupid mistake

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunder 作名词 → 愚蠢且明显的大错误

coreMeaning.en: plural of blunder; third person singular of blunder

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunder + s → 多个大错，或他/她犯错

coreMeaning.cn: 犯大错（动词用法）；跌跌撞撞
coreMeaning.en: to blunder; to make clumsy mistakes or move clumsily

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunder 作动词 → 笨拙地行动，犯严重错误

coreMeaning.en: dialectal or informal: to fail or make a mistake

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunk → 可能源自blunder的方言变体，表示出错或失败

coreMeaning.en: blunt; not sharp; speaking plainly; to make dull

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunt → 刀刃不锋利，引申为说话不加修饰、直来直去

coreMeaning.cn: 钝的；不锋利的（形容词用法标注）
coreMeaning.en: blunt as adjective; not sharp; direct in speech

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunt 作形容词 → 钝的，不锋利的，说话直率的

coreMeaning.en: past tense of blunt; made dull or less sharp

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunt + -ed → 已经变钝，锋芒被磨去

coreMeaning.en: comparative of blunt; more dull or direct

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunt + -er → 更加钝，更直率

coreMeaning.en: superlative of blunt; most dull or most direct

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunt + -est → 最钝，最直率不修边幅

coreMeaning.en: present participle of blunt; making dull or less effective

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunt + -ing → 正在使变钝，削弱锋芒

coreMeaning.en: bluntly; in a direct and frank manner

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunt（直率）+ -ly → 直率地，不绕弯子地
blunt 作名词 → 钝化的状态，或粗口（俚语）

coreMeaning.en: bluntness; the quality of being blunt or direct

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunt（直率）+ -ness → 直率坦诚的品质，说话不加修饰的特点

coreMeaning.en: third person singular of blunt; dulls; plural of blunt

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blunt + s → 他/她使变钝，或多个钝器

coreMeaning.en: blur; something out of focus; to make unclear

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: blur → 像涂鸦抹去一样，使影像模糊不清
